Gelato Scooping Station

Want to make your weddings and parties extra special? Our Scooping Station is the way to go! Experience exclusive gelato service at your event, with scoopers dishing out smiles and sweet memories!

Capacity: 100 pax or more

Min.Order: 3 Pans

Flavours: Up to 6 flavours

Price: From RM1440

Get Quotation

Pre-Packed Cups

Ideal for meetings, office events, or intimate gatherings. Our Pre-Packed Cups offer convenience without compromising on quality.

Comes with styrofoam box and ice packs.

Freezer rentals are available for larger events. Get Quotation.

Min.Order: 30 cups / flavour

Get Quotation

FAQ

How far in advance should I order for an event?

We recommend placing your event orders at least 7 days in advance to ensure we have everything ready to scoop up the fun.

Can I have customise gelato for my event?

Currently we don’t offer customisation on our gelato.

If I’m not sure which flavours we want to decide, can we have a try at your store?

Certainly! Feel free to visit us on any date you prefer.

@orgelato
Original Gelato, The Real Deal

OrGelato crafts real artisanal gelato and gelato cakes — handmade the Italian way, no shortcuts.

Same-day delivery across KL.

Need a birthday cake? Our gelato cakes have you covered.
